design_intent: Hollywood Regency living room with high-gloss lacquer, mirrored surfaces, bold geometric pattern, faux fur texture, and polished maximalist glamour.

selected_pieces.product_name: JIONJOY 28 x 28 Metal Round Wall Mirror- Gold
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered above the main sofa on the largest wall, hung slightly high to catch lamplight and multiply reflections across the room.

selected_pieces.product_name: Manila Round Hammered Drum Coffee Table Brass - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered in front of the seating group, leaving a generous 16-inch clearance from the sofa edge to keep the room feeling crisp and glamorous.

selected_pieces.product_name: Glam Decorative Ceramic Leaf Bud Vase for Room and Office Decor, White and Gold, 6 L x 6 W x 8 H Inches
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed off-center on the coffee table with a few glossy stems, creating a small sculptural moment without blocking the mirror-like tabletop sheen.
Clustered beside the ceramic vase on the coffee table, adding a second metallic note that echoes the gold mirror frame and reinforces the Art Deco glamour.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layered beneath the full seating arrangement with the front legs of the sofa and chairs resting on it, defining the lounge zone and softening the floor under evening light.

selected_pieces.product_name: Heavyweight Velvet Curtain Rod Pocket Panels (Set of 2) Beige 120”
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung floor-to-ceiling at the primary window, puddling just slightly so the velvet panels frame the room with a formal, theatrical drape.
